title: Quick Start for Manufacturer Reps
description: From your home page to your first sent bid in five steps — about ten minutes end to end.

title: Welcome to BuildVision
description: What BuildVision does: it turns the bids and documents in your inbox into structured project intelligence so you can quote faster.

title: Email Forwarding
description: Forward your bid-desk inbox to Bids@BuildVision.io so every bid, RFQ, and project document ingests automatically. Step-by-step for Gmail, Outlook on the web, and classic Outlook desktop.

title: Understanding Bid / No-Bid Emails
description: For every project we ingest, BuildVision sends a bid / no-bid recommendation based on fit to your line card, scope, equipment, engineer of record, and location — so reps can prioritize quickly.

title: Access Other Offices
description: Switch between your root account and any child office from My Profile, or from Settings → Company.

title: Inviting Teammates
description: Add the people who need access. New users receive login credentials by email and set their own password on first sign-in at app.buildvision.io/login.

title: Admin vs Member Permissions
description: Admins manage account settings, users, and integrations. Members work day to day on projects and bids. Assign the lowest level that lets each person do their job.

title: Saved Login Credentials for Protected Files
description: When bids link to documents behind a login (SharePoint, Google Drive, OneDrive), save credentials so BuildVision can open them automatically. Credentials are per user — one per platform.

title: Files, Schedules & Extraction
description: Open a project's Files tab to see schedule tagging in action — each tag jumps to the right page in the plans — and review extracted equipment inline in the PDF viewer.

title: Company Settings & Organization Structure
description: Manage your organization, offices, line cards, and user hierarchy under Settings → Company. This view shows every office with its type, users, timezone, and address.

title: Bids Aren't Showing Up
description: Usually the forwarding rule isn't active, the address wasn't verified, or the filter is too narrow. Confirm the rule is on, that Bids@BuildVision.io is verified, and widen the filter, then send a test bid.

title: Can't Open a Protected Document
description: If BuildVision can't open a SharePoint or Google Drive link, add a saved credential for that provider under User Settings → Saved Credentials, then re-process the email.

title: Platform Tour
description: A guided walkthrough of the BuildVision home page, projects, files, and settings.

title: Submitting Your First Bid
description: Watch how to go from an ingested project to a submitted proposal.
